title: OMWH
description: On My Way Home — /home takes you to your respawn point (bed/anchor), /spawn to your current dimension's spawn. No cross-dimension travel. Mounts and passengers come with you. Server-side only, no client install needed.
body:
# OMWH — On My Way Home

**O**n **M**y **W**ay **H**ome — a lightweight Fabric utility mod adding `/home` and `/spawn` teleport commands with full configuration support.

Built by **[PyreHaven](https://pyrehaven.xyz)**.

---

## Commands

### `/home`
Teleports you to your **respawn point** — your bed or respawn anchor, wherever it was last set. Works within the same dimension only (no cross-dimension teleport).

### `/spawn`
Teleports you to the **spawn point of your current dimension**:
- **Overworld** → world spawn
- **Nether** → Nether spawn
- **End** → the obsidian platform

Neither command crosses dimensions — you teleport to the spawn or home point of whichever dimension you are already in.

### Mounts & Passengers
If you are riding a mount (horse, boat, pig, strider, etc.), it comes with you. Any **passengers or entities inside your vehicle** — including other players — also teleport along for the ride.

---

## Features

- **Configurable cooldowns** — regular, PvP, damage taken, and join cooldowns
- **Configurable aliases** (e.g. `/h`, `/s`)
- **Custom messages** with `{time}` placeholder support
- **Teleport effects** — optional sound and particles on arrival
- **Safe teleport** — won't drop you into the void
- JSON config at `config/omwh.json` — auto-created on first run

---

## Compatibility

✅ Works **singleplayer** (install on client like any Fabric mod)
✅ Works **server-side only** — install on the server, **no client mod required**
✅ Minecraft 1.21.1 • Fabric Loader ≥ 0.16.13 • Fabric API

---

## Config

Auto-generated at `config/omwh.json` on first launch. Customize cooldowns (in seconds), command names, messages, and effect toggles. Changes take effect on restart.

---

## Links
